title: 【UNTIL YOU】Cute Stealing Coins Cents Penny Cat Money Box Saving Money Collecting Money Piggy Bank for Kids Kids (Cute Strawberry Cat)
features: 💝Wanting to bring up the child a sense of proportion and the ability to save and cherish ？Just chose funny , this funny piggy bank.
🎀You just need to put your coin on the plate and the panda will seak out and steal it and say "thank you" in English,which is very funny and creative.
🎉Material: ABS plastic+eletronic component; Powered only by: 2*AA battery(not included)
💏Perfect (Christmas) Gifts for Kids and perfect novelty piggy bank for home and office desks.
description: Product Description Best Gift for Kids: Wanting to bring up the child a sense of proportion and the ability to save and cherish ？ Just chose funny , this funny piggy bank. How to use? 1.Confirm the coin outlet is closed.Turn the bottom power switch to ON position. 2.Put a coin to correct position and gently press the coin,starting the program. 3.After about several seconds,start-up procedure began to work. 4.The cute cat head rises to jackup the box cover,and its hand will take the coin into the box. How to take the coin out: 1.Before taking the coin out,please turn the power switch to off position,then use the hard object to along with the direction of the arrow to screw the lid that can open the outlet. 2.After removing the coin,use the same way to opposite direction of the arrow to screw the lid that can open or close the lid. Package includes: 1 × piggy bank(Cute Strawberry Cat) 1 x Instruction manual 1 x Gift Box Package
